mapper.update: UPDATE MA3_CERT_USER_MGT SET JOIN_FLG = 'N' ,DEVICE_ID = '-' ,LST_UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C' AND USER_ID <> #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1 = 1 AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C' WITH UR
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT , DEVICE_ID AS DEVCEID FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C' GROUP BY DEVICE_ID WITH UR
mapper.update: UPDATE MA3_CERT_USER_MGT SET JOIN_FLG = 'N' , DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} , LST_UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C' WITH UR
mapper.update: UPDATE MA3_CERT_USER_MGT SET JOIN_FLG = 'N' ,DEVICE_ID = '-' ,LST_UPD_DT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C'
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID as userId ,CONNECT_TYPE as connectType ,FIN_CERT_SEQ_NUM as finCertSeqNum ,DEVICE_ID as deviceId ,JOIN_FLG as joinFlg ,CAST(INIT_REG_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS initRegDt ,CAST(LST_UPD_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS lstUpdDt ,FIN_CERT_SMP_KEY_TKN as finCertSmpKeyTkn FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = #{connectType} WITH UR

SELECT USER_ID, CONNECT_TYPE, JOIN_FLG, FIN_CERT_SEQ_NUM, DEVICE_ID, INIT_REG_DT, LST_UPD_DT, FIN_CERT_SMP_KEY_TKN FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE DEVICE_ID LIKE ('%'|| #{deviceId}) AND JOIN_FLG = 'Y' AND CONNECT_TYPE = 'C'
WITH UR

SELECT USER_ID ,CONNECT_TYPE ,FIN_CERT_SEQ_NUM ,DEVICE_ID ,JOIN_FLG ,CAST(INIT_REG_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS initRegDt ,CAST(LST_UPD_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS lstUpdDt ,FIN_CERT_SMP_KEY_TKN FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1=1 AND FIN_CERT_SEQ_NUM = #{finCertSeqNum} AND CONNECT_TYPE = #{connectType} AND JOIN_FLG = 'Y' WITH UR

SELECT USER_ID ,CONNECT_TYPE ,FIN_CERT_SEQ_NUM ,DEVICE_ID ,JOIN_FLG ,CAST(INIT_REG_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS initRegDt ,CAST(LST_UPD_DT AS CHAR(10)) AS lstUpdDt ,FIN_CERT_SMP_KEY_TKN FROM MA3_CERT_USER_MGT WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CONNECT_TYPE = #{connectType} WITH UR
